final:
module ring_counter (
    input wire rst,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [4:0] count
);
    always @(posedge rst or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 5'b00001; // Reset to '00001'
        end else begin
            count <= {count[3:0], count[4]}; // Shift left and wrap around
        end
    end
endmodule
